about.title: About me
about.intro: Software Engineer with **9+ years of experience** delivering end-to-end web solutions. Specialized in **Python** and **Django** on the backend, with growing expertise in **React** on the frontend. I've led projects from conception to deployment across industries like **fintech**, **insurance**, **government** and **construction** — both as a **sole developer** and as part of **collaborative teams** where I never stop learning.
about.intro2: My track record includes optimizing data imports by **50%**, refactoring a **140-table database** reducing it by **15%**, processing **10M+ records** in the cloud, and integrating payment gateways like **Stripe**, **MercadoPago** and **Nequi**. I've deployed on **AWS**, **GCP**, **Heroku** and **Render**, and have hands-on experience with **data analysis**, **web scraping** and **machine learning**. I bring ownership, speed and results.

highlights: Development of new features for the SIU educational payment platform
Applied payment corrections in production databases
Implementation and maintenance of payment gateways
Improved efficiency in payment-related ticket resolution
